text: This chapter shall not apply with respect to any motor vehicle owned by the United States, this State, or any political subdivision of this State, or any municipality therein.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.370 — Applicability.

This chapter shall not apply with respect to any motor vehicle owned by the United States, this State, or any political subdivision of this State, or any municipality therein.

subsections.text: This chapter shall not apply with respect to any motor vehicle owned by the United States, this State, or any political subdivision of this State, or any municipality therein.
